/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fpv_osd.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fpv_osd.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fpv_osd.dir/src/camera.cpp.o -o fpv_osd  -Wl,-rpath,/home/orzel/israel/PrimaryFlightDisplay/bin/src/imgui -lcamera -lcamera-base -lEGL -lGLESv2 -lgbm -ldrm src/imgui/libimgui.so -lpthread -lrt
